summary: Add input validation, error handling, and JWT authentication to the FastAPI task management API. Addresses missing Pydantic validation, unhandled KeyErrors, lack of authentication/authorization, and incomplete test coverage.

epics.title: Input Validation & Pydantic Models
epics.description: Replace raw dict parameters with typed Pydantic models, add field constraints, and validate status enum values.

stories.title: Define strict Pydantic request/response models
stories.description: Create TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, and TaskResponse models with field validation (max lengths, status enum, required fields).
tasks: Add TaskStatus enum (open, in_progress, done) to models.py
Create TaskCreate model with title (str, max_length=200, required), description (str, max_length=2000, optional), status (TaskStatus, default=open)
Create TaskUpdate model with all fields optional (Partial update pattern)
Create TaskResponse model extending TaskCreate with id field
Add unit tests for model validation (invalid status, oversized title, missing required fields)
acceptance_criteria: TaskCreate rejects title longer than 200 characters
TaskUpdate allows partial updates (all fields optional)
All models have type-safe status enum

stories.title: Wire Pydantic models into route handlers
stories.description: Replace dict parameters in task routes with Pydantic models. Return typed responses.
tasks: Update create_task to accept TaskCreate, return TaskResponse
Update update_task to accept TaskUpdate, return TaskResponse
Update list_tasks to return list[TaskResponse]
Update get_task to return TaskResponse
Verify FastAPI auto-generates OpenAPI schema with model types
acceptance_criteria: POST /tasks/ with invalid body returns 422 with field-level errors
OpenAPI docs at /docs reflect new models

epics.title: Error Handling & HTTP Status Codes
epics.description: Add proper error responses for missing resources, validation failures, and unexpected errors. Implement global exception handlers.

stories.title: Add 404 handling for task lookups
stories.description: Return proper 404 responses when tasks are not found instead of raising unhandled KeyError.
tasks: Add helper function or dependency to look up task by ID, raising HTTPException(404) if missing
Apply to get_task, update_task, and delete_task endpoints
Return consistent error response body: {"detail": "Task not found"}
acceptance_criteria: No unhandled KeyError stack traces in responses

stories.title: Add global exception handler middleware
stories.description: Catch unhandled exceptions and return structured 500 responses. Log errors for observability.
tasks: Add exception handler for generic Exception returning 500 with {"detail": "Internal server error"}
Add Python logging for caught exceptions (include traceback)
Ensure validation errors (RequestValidationError) return clean 422 responses
Add tests for exception handler behavior
acceptance_criteria: Unhandled exceptions return 500 with consistent JSON body
Stack traces are logged server-side but not exposed to clients

stories.title: Return proper HTTP status codes for mutations
stories.description: Use 201 for resource creation and 204 for deletion instead of 200 for everything.
tasks: Update create_task to return 201 Created (status_code=201)
Update delete_task to return 204 No Content
Update tests to assert correct status codes

epics.title: JWT Authentication & Authorization
epics.description: Add JWT-based authentication with role-based access control. Protect mutation endpoints while keeping read endpoints accessible.

stories.title: Implement JWT token creation and verification
stories.description: Create auth module with JWT encode/decode utilities using PyJWT. Support configurable secret and expiration.
tasks: Add PyJWT to dependencies
Create src/auth.py with create_access_token(subject, role, expires_delta) function
Add verify_token(token) function returning decoded payload or raising HTTPException(401)
Load JWT_SECRET from environment variable (fail fast if missing in production)
Add JWT_ALGORITHM (default HS256) and ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES (default 30) settings
Add unit tests for token creation, verification, and expiration
acceptance_criteria: create_access_token returns valid JWT with sub, role, and exp claims
verify_token decodes valid tokens and returns payload
verify_token raises 401 for tokens with invalid signature

stories.title: Create FastAPI auth dependencies
stories.description: Build reusable Depends() callables for extracting and validating JWT from Authorization header.
tasks: Create get_current_user dependency using OAuth2PasswordBearer scheme
Extract Bearer token from Authorization header
Decode token and return user payload
Create require_role(role) dependency factory for role-based checks
Return 401 for missing/invalid tokens, 403 for insufficient role
acceptance_criteria: get_current_user extracts user from valid Bearer token
OpenAPI docs show lock icon on protected endpoints

stories.title: Protect task mutation endpoints
stories.description: Apply auth dependencies to POST, PUT, DELETE endpoints. Keep GET endpoints public.
tasks: Add get_current_user dependency to create_task
Add get_current_user dependency to update_task
Add require_role('admin') or get_current_user to delete_task
Keep list_tasks and get_task public (no auth required)
Add integration tests with valid/invalid/missing tokens

stories.title: Add login endpoint for token issuance
stories.description: Create a simple /auth/token endpoint that issues JWTs. For this example, use a hardcoded user store (not production-ready).
tasks: Create src/routes/auth.py with POST /auth/token endpoint
Accept username/password via OAuth2PasswordRequestForm
Validate against a simple in-memory user store (for demo purposes)
Return {"access_token": "...", "token_type": "bearer"}
Register auth router in main.py
Add tests for login success and failure
acceptance_criteria: POST /auth/token with valid credentials returns access_token
Returned token is valid and decodable
Token includes sub and role claims

epics.title: Test Coverage & CI Readiness
epics.description: Expand test suite to cover all new functionality. Ensure tests are structured for CI pipeline integration.

stories.title: Comprehensive endpoint test suite
stories.description: Add tests for all CRUD operations, error cases, validation failures, and auth flows.
tasks: Add tests for 404 responses on all task endpoints
Add tests for 422 validation errors (invalid input)
Add tests for authenticated create/update/delete flows
Add tests for unauthenticated access to protected endpoints
Add tests for role-based access control on delete
Add test for health endpoint remains accessible
Organize tests into test_tasks.py, test_auth.py, test_validation.py
acceptance_criteria: All CRUD operations have happy-path tests
Auth flow (login, use token, expired token) is tested
Tests pass with pytest and produce clear output
Test files are organized by domain

implementation_order: E1-S1: Define Pydantic models (foundation for validation)

risks.risk: In-memory user store is not production-ready
risks.mitigation: Clearly document as demo-only; design auth module interface to swap in a real user store later

risks.risk: JWT_SECRET must not be hardcoded or committed
risks.mitigation: Load from environment variable; fail fast if missing; add to .env.example but not .env

risks.risk: Global counter for task IDs is not thread-safe
risks.mitigation: Out of scope for this plan; note as future improvement
